The '''Class-B cargo container''' was a hexagonal-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The Class-B container was often used to transport vehicles.<ref name="XWA" />
